reviews.review_description: Loved this game about a year ago now I've tried to play it multiple times but the play button does not work
I bought this game and it doesn’t do anything. It just keeps wanting you to buy more
Why in the beginning you have to buy a ball?
I got every plave but 4th and all it takes is pratice and I’ve only been playing from last night

Like the variety of games, but oh my god. The controls are so aggravating to me. When I would move with my left thumbstick, I could not stay still, and I kept running into things. Also, the throwing controls are not the best. I'm trying my best to be nice, but I was so excited to play this when I saw the description, and the controls are just so laggy and the throwing is so hard to do, I could barely shoot baskets and could barely ski the balls without hitting glass.
first,i can’t throw straight. second,you can’t hook and finally, the game keeps on lagging.

Had so much potential but has just been cheaped out and doesn’t work properly 

Hope you found this helpful 

Ps check out my YouTube channel I only have 1video but pls check it out will upload more content soon

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for trying out Chamvr!
You think is too laggy overall, or in a specific game?
What should I improve in the game to make it more fun?
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I tried to "Join" a table game and it took me up to the ceiling. I wanted to play Crazy Eights but I was stuck on the ceiling. I liked the bowling, Ski Ball and Basketball games. I received a few tickets and spent them at the bowling ball pyramid. I like this easy game room. I am looking forward to playing cards and Dominos. Please add the cards game " Kings on the Corners"

developer_response.body: Sorry for the inconvenience, most likely the servers were down. I just released a new version that's much more stable, you should be able to play now. Please let me know if more issues are found. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I’ve been trying so hard, but every time I try to throw My ball, always end up going to the right or left please fix this but otherwise this is a great game. I don’t seem to have any other issues.
I can’t go into the demo game been waiting for 15 minutes.
I’m confused on how to join a server none of my codes work and the only working server is not working

developer_response.body:
Hi BaconKing597,
Sometimes the server gets overloaded, sorry for that. I'm making improvements to keep it on most of the time. You should be able to play now. The code for the main server is "demo"

reviews.review_description: it's stuck on loading screen after trying to enter demo server  idk what to do  may just delete game I had hi hopes  but been stuck  3/4 loaded for 30+ min

developer_response.body: Sorry for the problems connecting to the server. I just released a new version that's more stable, you should be able to play now. Please let me know if you find any more issues, I'll make sure to fix them. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: It's a Fun Arcade game with lots of different options and it's FREE! What more can you want from a free game?
